title: CORS hardcodes port 7734 but LISTEN_ADDR is configurable
description: In daemon/src/main.rs, the CORS allow_origin list hardcodes 'http://localhost:7734' and 'http://127.0.0.1:7734'. However, the listen address is configurable via the LISTEN_ADDR environment variable. If LISTEN_ADDR is set to a different port (e.g. 127.0.0.1:8080), browser WebSocket clients and JMAP web clients connecting to the configured port will have their CORS preflight requests rejected. Fix: derive the allowed origins dynamically from the parsed socket_addr at startup rather than hardcoding the default port.
